name: agentic-sdlc
description: Stack-agnostic agent-based SDLC pipeline: PRD -> FRD -> branch -> DI -> code -> CVR -> readiness gate -> IR. Per-phase/module/feature branching, doc-first enforcement, and a project-detected config adapter so the same pipeline runs on any stack. Run /agentic-sdlc:sdlc-init in any repo to bootstrap.
